criteria.name: seeded_registry_complete
criteria.description: On load, the agent table contains at least 8 seeded agents visible without pagination, spanning at least 3 editor integrations and covering idle, running, error, and offline statuses, and each row shows name, type, editor integration, a status badge, and a last-seen timestamp
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that seeded_registry_complete meets the criteria.

criteria.name: rollup_strip_tracks_collection
criteria.description: A summary strip above the table shows per-status counts plus a total that match the actual rows, and the counts update in the same interaction as any status change or registration
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that rollup_strip_tracks_collection meets the criteria.

criteria.name: error_retry_transitions_to_idle
criteria.description: An agent in error status shows a Retry control in its row; activating it flips the status badge to idle and appends a matching entry to that agent's event timeline
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that error_retry_transitions_to_idle meets the criteria.

criteria.name: register_valid_agent_appears
criteria.description: Submitting Register Agent with a payload that satisfies the field contract (name 2 to 40 unique chars, agent type and editor integration from their closed sets, access key 16 to 64 letters/digits/hyphen/underscore) closes the modal and adds exactly one new idle row with a fresh last-seen timestamp, and the rollup total increases by one
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that register_valid_agent_appears meets the criteria.

criteria.name: register_invalid_shows_inline_errors
criteria.description: Submitting the registration form with an empty name, a name outside 2 to 40 characters, a duplicate name ignoring case, a missing type, a missing editor integration, an empty access key, an access key outside 16 to 64 characters, or disallowed access-key characters shows an inline error naming each invalid field, adds no row, and the submit control stays disabled until required fields are valid
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that register_invalid_shows_inline_errors meets the criteria.

criteria.name: detail_panel_tabs_render
criteria.description: Clicking an agent row opens a right-docked panel naming the agent with its status badge and three tabs: Configuration showing name, type, editor integration, a masked access key, and status; History showing the last 10 status events with timestamps in reverse chronological order; Activity listing today's executed prompts with timestamps or a designed empty state
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that detail_panel_tabs_render meets the criteria.

criteria.name: edit_prefilled_updates_in_place
criteria.description: The panel's Edit button opens the registration modal pre-filled with the agent's current values, and saving a change updates both the registry row and the open panel without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that edit_prefilled_updates_in_place meets the criteria.

criteria.name: remove_requires_confirm
criteria.description: The row overflow menu offers a Remove action that deletes the agent only after an explicit confirm step, after which the row disappears and the rollup counts decrease accordingly
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that remove_requires_confirm meets the criteria.

criteria.name: start_run_advances_steps
criteria.description: Scripted probe: start a run on an idle agent through the real control; its badge flips to running, the Activity tab shows a progress list of at least 5 named steps, step statuses advance visibly from pending to running to complete over the following seconds, and the n of m complete indicator updates with each tick
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that start_run_advances_steps meets the criteria.

criteria.name: retry_backoff_countdown_visible
criteria.description: In the seeded failure scenario, the failing step shows a retrying state with a visible attempt counter and a backoff countdown (for example waiting 5s before retry 2 of 3) that counts down on screen before the retry begins
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that retry_backoff_countdown_visible meets the criteria.

criteria.name: manual_retry_resumes_from_step
criteria.description: A step that exhausts its retries is marked failed with an inline error summary and a manual retry control, and activating it resumes the run from that step while previously completed steps keep their original timestamps and outputs unchanged
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that manual_retry_resumes_from_step meets the criteria.

criteria.name: run_completion_returns_idle
criteria.description: When all steps of a run complete, the run is marked complete with a visible total duration and the agent's status badge returns to idle
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that run_completion_returns_idle meets the criteria.

criteria.name: pause_checkpoint_resume
criteria.description: Scripted probe: pause a running agent mid-run and confirm the badge shows paused, the step list freezes with a visible checkpoint on the in-progress step, and after resuming the run continues from exactly that step with earlier completed steps' timestamps unchanged
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that pause_checkpoint_resume meets the criteria.

criteria.name: bulk_pause_resume_selection
criteria.description: Scripted probe: select at least three agents by checkbox including running ones, activate Pause All, and confirm every selected running agent's badge flips to paused and the rollup counts shift in one action; Resume All then returns the paused selections to running
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that bulk_pause_resume_selection meets the criteria.

criteria.name: timeline_appends_and_filters
criteria.description: Every status transition, retry, checkpoint, and manual action appends a timestamped entry to the agent's History timeline in the same interaction; a filter control narrows the timeline by status kind and clearing it restores all entries
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that timeline_appends_and_filters meets the criteria.

criteria.name: timeline_entry_highlights_step
criteria.description: Selecting a timeline entry that refers to a run step highlights that step in the Activity tab's progress list
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that timeline_entry_highlights_step meets the criteria.

criteria.name: work_summary_disclosure_behavior
criteria.description: Each agent row's collapsible current-work summary is collapsed by default, expands on activation, remembers its open state per agent while the app stays open, shows an active indicator plus the in-progress step name while running, and shows a duration summary line after the last run completes
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that work_summary_disclosure_behavior meets the criteria.

criteria.name: status_filter_union_and_clear
criteria.description: Selecting multiple statuses in the filter toolbar shows the union of matching agents, clearing the filter restores all agents, the rollup strip continues to reflect the full collection while a filter is active, and a zero-match filter shows a designed empty state with a clear-filter control
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that status_filter_union_and_clear meets the criteria.

criteria.name: cancel_and_double_submit_guarded
criteria.description: Cancel on the register or edit modal leaves the registry unchanged, and rapidly double-activating the submit control creates exactly one agent
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that cancel_and_double_submit_guarded meets the criteria.

criteria.name: removed_agent_leaves_selection
criteria.description: Removing an agent that is checkbox-selected also drops it from the selection, and the bulk controls disable when the selection becomes empty
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that removed_agent_leaves_selection meets the criteria.

criteria.name: fleet_export_live_snapshot
criteria.description: Export fleet opens a preview of structured fleet JSON with version, exported-at ISO-8601 timestamp, rollup counts matching the strip, and an agents array whose entries carry name, agentType, editorIntegration, accessKey, status, lastSeen, timeline, and run; after a register or status mutation the reopened preview includes that mutation
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that fleet_export_live_snapshot meets the criteria.

criteria.name: export_copy_and_download
criteria.description: The export surface offers Copy, which places the exact visible preview text on the clipboard with visible confirmation, and Download, which starts a .json file download of that same text
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that export_copy_and_download meets the criteria.

criteria.name: fleet_import_round_trip
criteria.description: Importing a previously exported valid fleet JSON reconstructs the registry so visible names, statuses, and rollup counts match the pre-export mutated state, and the next Export preview matches those values
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that fleet_import_round_trip meets the criteria.

criteria.name: undo_redo_registry_mutations
criteria.description: After a register, edit, or remove, Undo restores the prior registry rows and rollup counts and Redo reapplies them; Undo and Redo controls are disabled when their stacks are empty
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that undo_redo_registry_mutations meets the criteria.

criteria.name: command_palette_jump_and_actions
criteria.description: Ctrl+K or Cmd+K opens a command palette listing Jump to agent entries plus Register Agent, Export fleet, Undo, and Redo; choosing a Jump entry opens that agent's detail panel and Escape closes the palette without mutating the registry
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that command_palette_jump_and_actions meets the criteria.

criteria.name: empty_registry_or_filter_empty_state
criteria.description: Removing the last agent or applying a status filter with zero matches shows a designed empty state in the table region rather than a bare table; zero-match filter empty state names the filter and offers clear-filter
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that empty_registry_or_filter_empty_state meets the criteria.

criteria.name: field_contract_inline_validation
criteria.description: Name length 1 or 41, duplicate name ignoring case, access key length 15 or 65, or access key with a space shows an inline error naming the field before submit and adds no row
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that field_contract_inline_validation meets the criteria.

criteria.name: errors_name_field_and_rule
criteria.description: Validation and import errors name the field and the rule broken (for example access key must be 16 to 64 characters) rather than only saying Invalid
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that errors_name_field_and_rule meets the criteria.

criteria.name: toasts_after_mutations_and_export
criteria.description: Register, remove, bulk actions, export copy, and import show visible confirmation feedback that auto-dismisses
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that toasts_after_mutations_and_export meets the criteria.

criteria.name: run_steps_show_progress_feedback
criteria.description: While a simulated run is active, step statuses and the n of m progress indicator provide continuous visible progress feedback
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that run_steps_show_progress_feedback meets the criteria.

criteria.name: remove_confirm_and_undo
criteria.description: Remove requires an explicit confirm step, and Undo is available afterward to restore the removed agent
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that remove_confirm_and_undo meets the criteria.

criteria.name: cancel_and_double_submit_safe
criteria.description: Cancel on register/edit leaves the registry unchanged; double-activating submit creates exactly one agent
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that cancel_and_double_submit_safe meets the criteria.

criteria.name: import_rejects_malformed_contract

criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that import_rejects_malformed_contract meets the criteria.

criteria.name: empty_undo_redo_disabled

criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that empty_undo_redo_disabled meets the criteria.

criteria.name: palette_escape_no_mutation

criteria.name: pause_all_idle_selection_noop

criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that pause_all_idle_selection_noop meets the criteria.

criteria.name: export_empty_agents_compiles

criteria.name: innovation_catchall
criteria.description: The app demonstrates a noteworthy, browser-observable enhancement beyond the spec that is NOT covered by any other criterion in this file. The enhancement must plausibly matter to a real user, not be a nitpick. If present, name the enhancement and cite the concrete evidence (element, page state, screenshot) that demonstrates it. If the enhancement is already covered — even partially — by another criterion in this file, answer no here and let that criterion carry it.
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that innovation_catchall meets the criteria.

criteria.name: form_fields_labeled_and_associated

criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that form_fields_labeled_and_associated meets the criteria.

criteria.name: headings_logical_order
criteria.description: Page title and panel/section headings follow a logical heading order without skips across the table and detail panel
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that headings_logical_order meets the criteria.

criteria.name: landmarks_present
criteria.description: Main console regions expose landmarks (for example main, complementary for the detail panel) so assistive tech can navigate the table vs panel
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that landmarks_present meets the criteria.

criteria.name: detail_panel_keyboard_dismissible
criteria.description: The detail panel is dismissible from the keyboard without requiring a pointer
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that detail_panel_keyboard_dismissible meets the criteria.

criteria.name: checkbox_selection_exposed
criteria.description: Row checkbox selection state is exposed to assistive technology, not only through visual styling
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that checkbox_selection_exposed meets the criteria.

criteria.name: disabled_controls_not_focus_traps
criteria.description: Disabled bulk controls and disabled Undo/Redo do not trap keyboard focus or appear operable when their stacks/selection are empty
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that disabled_controls_not_focus_traps meets the criteria.

criteria.name: cold_start_under_two_seconds
criteria.description: The app is interactive within 2 seconds of a local cold load with the seeded registry table visible
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that cold_start_under_two_seconds meets the criteria.

criteria.name: console_clean_full_exercise
criteria.description: No console errors or warnings appear on load or during a full exercise including simulated runs, export, import, undo, and bulk pause/resume
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that console_clean_full_exercise meets the criteria.

criteria.name: ui_stays_responsive_under_runs
criteria.description: While multiple agents run simultaneously, filtering, selection, panel switches, and export reopen respond without multi-second hangs
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that ui_stays_responsive_under_runs meets the criteria.

criteria.name: run_progress_shows_live_feedback
criteria.description: Active simulated runs show continuous step and n of m progress updates rather than freezing the UI until completion
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that run_progress_shows_live_feedback meets the criteria.

criteria.name: seeded_registry_renders_smoothly
criteria.description: The seeded set of at least 8 agents renders in the table without perceived hitching on first load
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that seeded_registry_renders_smoothly meets the criteria.

criteria.name: rapid_filter_no_dropped_input
criteria.description: Rapid repeated status filter toggles and selection changes cause no dropped interactions or stuck controls
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that rapid_filter_no_dropped_input meets the criteria.

criteria.name: export_reopen_stays_snappy
criteria.description: Reopening Export fleet after mutations regenerates the preview without multi-second freezes
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that export_reopen_stays_snappy meets the criteria.

criteria.name: undo_redo_responsive
criteria.description: Rapid undo/redo through several registry mutations stays responsive with no hangs
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that undo_redo_responsive meets the criteria.

criteria.name: no_layout_thrash_on_ticks
criteria.description: Step-status ticks during a run do not cause visible layout thrashing or jank that freezes the table
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that no_layout_thrash_on_ticks meets the criteria.

criteria.name: import_parse_feedback_timely
criteria.description: Import validation feedback for malformed JSON appears promptly without locking the UI indefinitely
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that import_parse_feedback_timely meets the criteria.

criteria.name: console_layout_composition
criteria.description: At 1440 pixel width the app composes as a full-width data table with checkbox selection and per-row overflow menus, a toolbar carrying Register Agent, Export fleet, Import fleet, Undo, Redo, the bulk controls, and the status filter, and a right-docked detail panel approximately 320 pixels wide with Configuration / History / Activity tabs
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that console_layout_composition meets the criteria.

criteria.name: status_color_mapping_consistent
criteria.description: Status badges use one consistent color mapping everywhere they appear (table, panel, rollup strip): blue running, green idle, teal paused, red error, gray offline, and the error status cell carries a visibly distinct error treatment beyond a plain badge
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that status_color_mapping_consistent meets the criteria.

criteria.name: rollup_tiles_and_status_icons
criteria.description: The rollup strip renders as compact stat tiles sharing one visual treatment, and timeline entries and progress steps use consistent per-status iconography
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that rollup_tiles_and_status_icons meets the criteria.

criteria.name: type_hierarchy_clear
criteria.description: A clear typographic hierarchy is visible: page title larger than panel headings, which are larger than table body and timeline text, consistent across the table and detail panel
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that type_hierarchy_clear meets the criteria.

criteria.name: spacing_and_dividers_consistent
criteria.description: Spacing follows one consistent rhythm across the toolbar, table, and detail panel, with hairline dividers separating timeline entries and step rows, and one consistent icon set used throughout
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that spacing_and_dividers_consistent meets the criteria.

criteria.name: control_states_distinct
criteria.description: Buttons, inputs, tabs, and filter controls show distinct default, hover, focus (visible ring), and disabled treatments, confirmed by inspecting computed styles while the state is active
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that control_states_distinct meets the criteria.

criteria.name: visual_polish_rating
criteria.description: Rate the overall visual polish of the console: coherent palette, disciplined admin density, and a designed rather than default-template appearance
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that visual_polish_rating meets the criteria.

criteria.name: export_drawer_monospace_preview
criteria.description: The export fleet surface shows a monospaced JSON preview block with Copy and Download actions, visually consistent with the console's toolbar and panel language
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that export_drawer_monospace_preview meets the criteria.

criteria.name: cold_load_interactive
criteria.description: The app serves from its documented start path and is interactive (table rendered, controls responding) within 2 seconds of a local cold load
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that cold_load_interactive meets the criteria.

criteria.name: console_clean_full_exercise
criteria.description: No console errors, warnings, or unhandled promise rejections appear on load or during a full exercise of the app, including active simulated runs, retries, and bulk actions
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that console_clean_full_exercise meets the criteria.

criteria.name: run_state_single_source
criteria.description: The Activity progress list and the History timeline stay consistent with each other during a run: a step transition visible in one is reflected in the other in the same interaction, indicating both derive from one live run state
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that run_state_single_source meets the criteria.

criteria.name: reload_restores_seeded_baseline
criteria.description: After exercising the app (registration, runs, pauses, filters, export, import, undo), a page reload returns it to the seeded baseline: the seeded agents and histories, no active filter, no open panel, empty undo and redo stacks, and no open export or import surface
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that reload_restores_seeded_baseline meets the criteria.

criteria.name: runs_differ_across_repeats
criteria.description: Running the simulated work twice (or on two agents) produces visibly different step timings or outcomes, proving the run machinery derives from live logic rather than one hardcoded script
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that runs_differ_across_repeats meets the criteria.

criteria.name: responsive_under_concurrent_runs
criteria.description: With multiple agents running simultaneously, rapid repeated filtering, selection changes, and panel switches cause no hangs, dropped interactions, or desynced counts
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that responsive_under_concurrent_runs meets the criteria.

criteria.name: export_and_import_share_store
criteria.description: Export preview text and a successful import both derive from the same live registry as the table and rollup: a mutation visible in the table appears in the next export, and an import updates the table and rollup together without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that export_and_import_share_store meets the criteria.

criteria.name: desktop_docked_panel_layout
criteria.description: At desktop widths around 1440 pixels the detail panel is docked at approximately 320 pixels beside the table with the toolbar usable in one row or a deliberate wrap
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that desktop_docked_panel_layout meets the criteria.

criteria.name: tablet_panel_becomes_overlay
criteria.description: At widths of 768 pixels and below the detail panel opens as a dismissible overlay covering the table rather than staying a squeezed dock
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that tablet_panel_becomes_overlay meets the criteria.

criteria.name: mobile_no_page_horizontal_scroll
criteria.description: At 375 pixel width no content clips or overflows the viewport and no page-level horizontal scrolling appears
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that mobile_no_page_horizontal_scroll meets the criteria.

criteria.name: table_scrolls_in_container
criteria.description: At 375 pixel width the data table scrolls within its own container instead of forcing page-level horizontal scroll
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that table_scrolls_in_container meets the criteria.

criteria.name: export_import_usable_on_mobile
criteria.description: At 375 pixel width the export preview and import surface remain fully usable and scroll within their own containers
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that export_import_usable_on_mobile meets the criteria.

criteria.name: toolbar_wraps_without_overlap
criteria.description: On narrow widths the toolbar controls (Register, Export, Import, bulk, filters) wrap or collapse without overlapping the table or each other
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that toolbar_wraps_without_overlap meets the criteria.

criteria.name: tap_targets_adequate_mobile
criteria.description: Primary controls on mobile (row actions, Register, Export, checkboxes) present tap targets large enough to use without precise pointing
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that tap_targets_adequate_mobile meets the criteria.

criteria.name: typography_readable_across_breakpoints
criteria.description: Page title, table text, and panel headings remain readable from 1440 down to 375 without overlapping or truncating into illegibility
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that typography_readable_across_breakpoints meets the criteria.

criteria.name: palette_usable_narrow
criteria.description: The command palette remains usable as an overlay at 375 pixel width without clipping its search field or results
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that palette_usable_narrow meets the criteria.

criteria.name: rollup_strip_adapts
criteria.description: The rollup strip remains readable at narrow widths by wrapping or scrolling within its region rather than overflowing the viewport
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that rollup_strip_adapts meets the criteria.

criteria.name: hover_feedback_present
criteria.description: While hovering with the real pointer, toolbar buttons ease background or shadow with a slight press effect on activation, table rows take a full-width hover wash, and overflow menu items highlight, confirmed via computed styles while the hover is held
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that hover_feedback_present meets the criteria.

criteria.name: rows_animate_in_and_out
criteria.description: Registering an agent through the real form animates the new row in from transparency over roughly 200 milliseconds, and removing an agent animates its row out rather than snapping
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that rows_animate_in_and_out meets the criteria.

criteria.name: status_badge_color_transition
criteria.description: Changing an agent's status through a real control (retry, run start, pause, resume, or bulk action) animates the badge background color change over roughly 300 milliseconds rather than swapping instantly
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that status_badge_color_transition meets the criteria.

criteria.name: step_ticks_and_progress_fill
criteria.description: While a run advances, each step's status icon changes with a short scale or fade transition and the overall progress indicator fills smoothly rather than jumping
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that step_ticks_and_progress_fill meets the criteria.

criteria.name: backoff_countdown_animates
criteria.description: During a retrying step, the backoff countdown visibly updates each second and the retrying state carries a subtle pulse while waiting
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that backoff_countdown_animates meets the criteria.

criteria.name: panel_slide_and_tab_crossfade
criteria.description: Opening an agent's detail panel slides it in from the right and closing slides it out, and switching between Configuration, History, and Activity tabs cross-fades content without layout jumps
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that panel_slide_and_tab_crossfade meets the criteria.

criteria.name: summary_expand_with_chevron
criteria.description: Activating a row's current-work summary expands it with a smooth height transition and a rotating chevron cue, and collapsing reverses both
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that summary_expand_with_chevron meets the criteria.

criteria.name: modal_and_toast_transitions
criteria.description: The register and edit modal, the export drawer, the import surface, and the command palette enter and exit with a short opacity and scale transition of roughly 200 to 300 milliseconds, and confirmation toasts after register, remove, bulk actions, export copy, and import slide in and auto-dismiss with a fade
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that modal_and_toast_transitions meets the criteria.

criteria.name: reduced_motion_respected
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion enabled, transitions apply instantly and every flow (registration, runs, pause and resume, panel, timeline) remains fully usable
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that reduced_motion_respected meets the criteria.

criteria.name: in_memory_reload_resets_coherently
criteria.description: Multi-facet round-trip: register an agent, apply a status filter, open a detail panel, then reload — the app coherently resets to the seeded baseline (seeded agents, no filter, no panel, empty undo stacks), never a mix of persisted and reset facets
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that in_memory_reload_resets_coherently meets the criteria.

criteria.name: status_filter_union_proves_live
criteria.description: Status-filter proof: select one status and note the visible set, then add a second status; the visible set becomes the union of both, and clearing restores all agents, proving filters derive from the live collection
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that status_filter_union_proves_live meets the criteria.

criteria.name: export_derived_view_tracks_mutations
criteria.description: Derived-view sensitivity: register an agent or change a status, reopen Export fleet, and confirm the JSON agents array and rollup counts change to match the session rather than redrawing identical hardcoded text
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that export_derived_view_tracks_mutations meets the criteria.

criteria.name: cross_view_row_panel_export_echo
criteria.description: Cross-view echo: edit an agent's name in the modal and confirm the table row, detail panel Configuration tab, and Export fleet preview all show the new name without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that cross_view_row_panel_export_echo meets the criteria.

criteria.name: rollup_count_delta_exact
criteria.description: Count-delta integrity: measure the rollup total immediately before and after a valid register; the delta is exactly plus one with no lag
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that rollup_count_delta_exact meets the criteria.

criteria.name: different_agents_different_export
criteria.description: Input-dependent output: register two agents with different valid names and confirm the Export fleet JSON contains both distinct names rather than identical entries
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that different_agents_different_export meets the criteria.

criteria.name: interleaved_register_and_run
criteria.description: Interleaved-flow integrity: start registering an agent, cancel, start a run on another agent, then complete a new register — the running agent's progress continues and the new agent appears once without corrupting either flow
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that interleaved_register_and_run meets the criteria.

criteria.name: empty_then_repopulate_tracks_export
criteria.description: Edge-state round-trip: remove agents down to empty (empty state visible, export agents array empty), then register one valid agent; the table, rollup total, and Export preview all show exactly that one agent
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that empty_then_repopulate_tracks_export meets the criteria.

criteria.name: undo_round_trip_restores_export
criteria.description: Undo round-trip: remove an agent, confirm it disappears from Export preview, Undo once, and confirm the agent returns in the table and Export preview
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that undo_round_trip_restores_export meets the criteria.

criteria.name: export_import_reconstructs_state
criteria.description: Export/import pipeline: mutate the registry, export fleet JSON, import that JSON, and confirm visible names, statuses, and rollup counts match the exported document
criteria.reasoning: Observed in screenshot TASK-FUNC-001-shared.png and recorded user flow videos that export_import_reconstructs_state meets the criteria.
